transactions: June 9, 2009:Drafted by theTampa Bay Raysin the24th roundof the 2009 amateur draft, but did not sign.
June 4, 2012:Drafted by theMiami Marlinsin the1st round(9th pick) of the 2012 amateur draft. Player signed July 13, 2012.
December 11, 2014:Traded by theMiami MarlinswithAustin Barnes,Chris HatcherandEnrique Hernándezto theLos Angeles DodgersforDee Strange-Gordon,Dan Haren,Miguel Rojasand cash.
December 11, 2014:Traded by theLos Angeles Dodgersto theLos Angeles Angels of AnaheimforHowie Kendrick.
July 30, 2021:Traded by theLos Angeles Angelswith cash to theNew York YankeesforJanson JunkandElvis Peguero.
November 10, 2021:Signed as a Free Agent with theLos Angeles Dodgers.
December 9, 2022:Signed as a Free Agent with theTexas Rangers.
February 22, 2025:Signed as a Free Agent with thePittsburgh Pirates.
September 1, 2025:Signed as a Free Agent with theLos Angeles Dodgers.
